productDisplayName: Fila Men Vintage Hi Black Casual Shoes
description: If fashionable comfort is what you are looking for in your footwear, then here's that perfect pair for you! The fila Vintage  Hi-Ankle sneaker is a great buy, what with its lightweight cushioned comfort and stylish look.UpperSynthetic leather upper with a nubuck lining around the collar and nubuck strip at the back legSynthetic leather and colourful PU strips on the side midfoot for enhanced styleEmbroidered branding on lateral ankle for added styleLace-up system through metallic eyelets for a snug, customised FitColourful fabric inner lining with a padded tongue and collar for all-day sweat-free comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionColourful cushioned fabric footbed for all-day, sweat-free comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticRubber foxing along the outer periphery for enhanced durabilityOutsole Durable rubber outsole with design grooves throughout the footbed for ultimate grip and traction even on smooth surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
